# Jayaram Bhavani Prasad — Python Developer Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Chintala Jayaram Bhavani Prasad, a Python developer specializing in Django, REST APIs, and cloud-based web applications.

The site showcases professional experience, skills, education, and projects, with contact details for collaboration and hiring inquiries.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Hero, about, skills, experience, projects, education, and contact sections.
